name: Grupo Palacio de Hierro, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: Grupo Palacio de Hierro, S.A.B. de C.V. engages in the operation of department stores in Mexico. Its stores offers luxury, boutique, fashion, perfumery, home, and technology products. The company also engages in restaurant and logistic businesses. Grupo Palacio de Hierro, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1888 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
